📱 Core Engineering

Native performance.

We build iOS and Android apps using Flutter — one codebase, both platforms, delivered in 4-8 weeks. From a ₹1.5L MVP for your startup to a full-featured enterprise app.

Starting Price

CAPABILITIES

Core Features

🍎

iOS & Android Native

High-performance native apps for when you need platform-specific features — camera APIs, Bluetooth, NFC, or deep OS integration. Built with Swift for iOS and Kotlin for Android.

📱

Cross-Platform (Flutter)

One codebase that runs on both iOS and Android — meaningfully faster and cheaper to build and maintain than two separate native apps. Our default recommendation for most projects.

💻

Desktop Applications

Powerful desktop applications for Windows, macOS, and Linux using Electron and Tauri.

🎨

UI/UX Design for Mobile

Wireframes and interactive prototypes in Figma before any code is written. You see and approve every screen before development starts.

🛡️

App Store Compliances

Ensuring your app meets all strict App Store and Play Store guidelines, including data privacy and security requirements.

🚀

App Store & Play Store Publishing

We handle the entire submission process — screenshots, descriptions, compliance review, and approval — so your app goes live on both stores.

⚙️

Backend & API Development

Every app needs a backend. We build RESTful APIs, real-time databases, and push notification systems — hosted on Cloudflare Workers or Firebase for maximum uptime at minimum cost.

🩹

Post-Launch Support

A 30-day bug fix window is included with every project. Optional ongoing maintenance covers updates, OS compatibility, and new features.

OUR WORK

Mobile-first thinking in action

Dashak Pharma

B2B WhatsApp Ordering System

Built a WhatsApp-first ordering system for pharmaceutical distribution — retailers place orders via WhatsApp, the system auto-captures, invoices, and follows up. Zero app downloads required from end users, proof that sometimes the best 'app' is smart use of a platform your customers already have.

WhatsApp APIn8nAI Automation

Tech Stack

FlutterDartReact Native
SwiftSwiftUIXcode
KotlinJetpack ComposeAndroid Studio
FirebaseCloudflare WorkersSupabaseNode.jsREST APIs
FigmaAdobe XD

  • ✓Consumer iOS/Android Apps
  • ✓Enterprise Field Worker Apps
  • ✓Mobile E-Commerce

WHY YOUR BUSINESS NEEDS AN APP

What a mobile app actually gets you

Reach Customers on Their Phone

Your customers spend hours daily on their phones. An app puts your business in their pocket — accessible instantly, no browser required.

Work Offline

Unlike websites, apps can work without internet. Your field sales team, delivery staff, or customers in low-connectivity areas can still use your system.

Push Notifications

Send updates, offers, and reminders directly to your customer's phone — the most direct re-engagement channel available, with far higher visibility than email.

Faster Than a Website

Native and Flutter apps load instantly — no waiting for pages to download. Smooth animations and responsive interfaces that feel premium.

Build Customer Loyalty

An app on someone's home screen is a constant reminder of your brand. Loyalty programs, reorder buttons, and personalized experiences keep customers coming back.

Competitive Advantage

Most local businesses and SMBs in India don't have an app yet. Being first in your market gives you an edge that's hard for competitors to match.

WHY TRAI INC

Why work with us on your app

Flutter-First Approach

We recommend Flutter for most projects because it delivers both iOS and Android from one codebase, cutting your cost and timeline versus building two separate native apps.

Fixed Price, No Surprises

You get a written scope and exact price before we write a single line of code. No hourly billing, no scope-creep charges, no surprise invoices.

Weekly Staging Builds

Every week you get a testable version of your app. You see progress in real time and never wonder what's happening with your money.

You Own Everything

100% code ownership. Complete source code handover. Your app runs on your own Apple Developer and Google Play accounts. Zero vendor lock-in.

AI-Augmented Speed

Our team uses Claude, Gemini, and AI coding tools to write and review code faster, without cutting corners on quality.

Post-Launch Support

We don't disappear after delivery. A 30-day bug fix window is included, with an optional maintenance retainer for ongoing updates and OS compatibility.

WHO NEEDS A MOBILE APP

Built for your industry

E-Commerce & Retail

Product catalogs, cart, payment integration, order tracking, push notifications for offers.

Healthcare

Appointment booking, teleconsultation, health records, prescription management.

Real Estate

Property listings, virtual tours, lead capture, agent dashboards.

Food & Restaurant

Menu browsing, online ordering, delivery tracking, table reservations.

Education

Course catalogs, video streaming, quizzes, progress tracking, certificate generation.

Logistics

Fleet tracking, driver apps, proof of delivery, route optimization.

How Much Does a Mobile App Cost?

MVP / Starter App

₹1,50,000 – ₹3,00,000

6-8 weeks

5-10 screens, Firebase backend, Play Store + App Store submission

Best for: Startups validating an idea

Business App

₹3,00,000 – ₹5,00,000

8-12 weeks

15-25 screens, custom backend, admin dashboard, push notifications, analytics

Best for: SMBs digitizing their operations

Enterprise / Complex App

Contact for Custom Proposal

12-20 weeks

Full custom build, API integrations, role-based access, compliance, dedicated support

Best for: Large businesses with complex workflows

THE METHODOLOGY

How We Deliver Quality

01. Prototyping & UX

We design high-fidelity Figma prototypes and map out the entire user journey before writing a line of code.

02. Sprint Development

We build the app features incrementally, providing TestFlight and APK builds weekly for your review.

03. App Store Launch

We handle the rigorous Apple App Store and Google Play Store review processes for a smooth launch.

QUESTIONS & ANSWERS

Frequently Asked Questions

No. We use Flutter to build one app that works on both platforms, which meaningfully lowers cost and timeline compared to building two separate native apps.

Yes. You get weekly staging builds you can install on your own phone and test — real progress every week, not just status reports.

Yes. 100% code ownership is included. We hand over the complete source code, documentation, and all credentials. Your app runs on your own Apple Developer and Google Play accounts.

We provide a 30-day bug fix window at no extra cost. After that, you can optionally sign an annual maintenance contract (20% of the initial project cost) covering updates, security patches, and OS compatibility fixes.

Apple Developer account costs $99/year and Google Play is a one-time $25 — both paid directly to Apple/Google, not to us. Hosting on Firebase or Cloudflare is typically pennies for a small-to-mid-size app. Our optional maintenance contract is 20% of the initial project cost annually.

Ready to build your app?

Tell us your idea. We'll scope it, design the screens, and give you a fixed-price quote within 48 hours.
